# Harbor Design System

> A token-driven design system. Components are documented from their Figma source; every color, size, and type value resolves to a design token.

## Foundations

- [Token architecture](./foundations/overview.md): Harbor's values — colors, spacing, type, radii, shadows — live as design tokens, not
- [Color](./foundations/color.md): Every color in Harbor resolves to a token — see [Token architecture](./overview.md) for
- [Typography](./foundations/typography.md): See [Token architecture](./overview.md) for how the tier system works.
- [Dimensions](./foundations/dimensions.md): See [Token architecture](./overview.md) for how the tier system works.

## Components

- [Button](./components/button.md): Buttons let people take an action, confirm a choice, or move forward in a flow.
- [Select](./components/select.md): A select lets people choose one option from a list, without taking up the space
- [TextArea](./components/textarea.md): A text area lets people enter multiple lines of plain text — a comment, a
- [TextField](./components/textfield.md): A text field lets people enter a single line of plain text with a keyboard —
- [Design Tokens](./components/designtokens.md): Harbor's values — colors, spacing, type, radii, shadows — live as design tokens, not
